info.title: Real-Time Sephora API
info.description:
# 💄 Real-Time Sephora API

Unlock the full potential of **Sephora.com** data with our fast, scalable, and developer-friendly API. Built for performance, our API delivers rich product data, real-time inventory, reviews, store locations, and more - all with **sub-400ms response times** ⚡

With **11 powerful endpoints**, you can build everything from product discovery tools to advanced beauty recommendation engines - ideal for **e-commerce platforms**, **beauty apps**, **price comparison tools**, and **market research solutions** 💼💅

---

## 📅 Last Updated

**March 23, 2026**

## ⚡ Highlights

* 🚀 No proxies required
* 📊 Access to **1.5M+ data points**
* 🔄 Real-time Sephora data
* 🔒 Reliable & scalable infrastructure

---

## 🌐 Useful Links

* 🌍 **Official Website:** [https://happyendpoint.com/](https://happyendpoint.com/)
* 💄 **Sephora API:** [https://happyendpoint.com/apis/sephora](https://happyendpoint.com/apis/sephora)
* 📘 **Documentation:** [https://happyendpoint.com/apis/sephora/docs/](https://happyendpoint.com/apis/sephora/docs/)
* 🐦 **Twitter:** [https://x.com/happyendpointhq](https://x.com/happyendpointhq)
* 📩 **Contact Email:** [happyendpointhq@gmail.com](mailto:happyendpointhq@gmail.com)

---

## 📦 Bulk Sephora US Dataset Available (8,500+ Products)

In addition to our real-time API, we offer a **ready-to-use Sephora US dataset** for large-scale data needs.

### 📊 Dataset Includes:

* SKU ID
* Product ID
* Product URL
* Selling Price
* Brand
* Category
* Additional structured attributes

### 🎯 Perfect For:

* 📈 Market research & price monitoring
* 🥊 Competitive analysis
* 🛍️ Product catalog creation
* 🤖 AI training & data modeling
* 📦 Large-scale e-commerce ingestion

📩 **Need custom scraping or bulk data?**
We provide tailored scraping solutions. Reach out anytime:
👉 **[happyendpointhq@gmail.com](mailto:happyendpointhq@gmail.com)**

---

## 🚀 Key Features

* 📦 **Product Details** - Images, pricing, ingredients, specifications
* 🗃️ **Category & Brand Data** - Full structured directories
* 🧠 **Smart Search** - Autocomplete + keyword search
* 🛒 **Real-Time Availability** - Live stock updates
* 🏬 **Store Locator** - Geo-based store discovery
* 🌟 **Product Reviews** - Ratings & customer insights

---

## 📌 API Endpoints (11 Total)

### 🔍 Discovery & Search

* `/auto-complete` - Product suggestions from partial queries
* `/search-by-keyword` - Advanced keyword search with filters
* `/search-by-category` - Fetch products by category ID
* `/search-by-brand` - Retrieve products by brand

### 🗂️ Catalog & Metadata

* `/brands-list` - Full list of Sephora brands
* `/categories-list` - Root product categories
* `/category-data` - Subcategories and metadata

### 📦 Product Intelligence

* `/product-details` - Detailed product data (images, ingredients, pricing)
* `/product-reviews` - Customer reviews & ratings
* `/product-availability` - Store-level stock data

### 📍 Location Services

* `/store-list` - Nearby Sephora store locations

---

## ✅ Ideal Use Cases

* 🛍️ E-commerce & product comparison platforms
* 💄 Beauty & skincare mobile/web apps
* 🧠 AI-powered recommendation systems
* 📊 Market intelligence & trend analysis
* 📦 Inventory & pricing monitoring tools

---

## 📈 Why Choose This API?

* 🔄 **Real-time data directly from Sephora**
* ⚡ **Ultra-fast responses (<400ms)**
* 🔒 **Stable & reliable infrastructure**
* 🧩 **Easy REST API integration**
* 🌍 **Global store coverage with geo queries**

---

## 🚀 Get Started

Start building today with the **Sephora API** and power your applications with real-time beauty retail data.

💅 Build smarter. Ship faster. Scale effortlessly.

### Authentication

Include these headers in every request:
- `X-RapidAPI-Key`: Your RapidAPI key
- `X-RapidAPI-Host`: real-time-sephora-api.p.rapidapi.com
---

## 🔎 SEO Keywords

Sephora API, beauty API, cosmetics API, skincare API, makeup API, Sephora product data API, real-time product API, e-commerce API, product search API, retail data API, price comparison API, beauty tech API, product reviews API, inventory API, store locator API, brand data API, cosmetics data scraping, Sephora scraper, product dataset API, beauty product dataset, API for makeup products, RapidAPI Sephora API, shopping API, product catalog API, AI training dataset cosmetics, market research beauty data

Results.OriginalProductName: Major Headlines Double-Take Crème & Powder Blush Duo Not Too Much
Results.ReviewText: Hope this helps if you were deciding between colors. Couldn't add more labels but the top is holiday '23 - Need Her, Main Character. All of these show up (slightly) different on medium-tan skin. These colors are pretty unique IMO.
Results.Title: Hope this is helpful

IncentivizedReview.DimensionLabel: I received this product as a free sample

Results.OriginalProductName: Major Headlines Double-Take Crème & Powder Blush Duo She's Vibrant
Results.ReviewText: Highly recommend if you’re medium dark-deep dark skin tone! This blush is very vibrant, almost neon pink in the pan but just like orange blush, gives your the most flattering, feminine, flirty wash of pink! Definitely a must have for the summer! If you’re new to blush, I recommend just using the powder until your comfortable. If you’re blush obsessed like me, you’ll def enjoy the look of layering the cream underneath the powder! The wear time for this product is great weather you did one, the other, or layered both! This is my second blush duo I’ve purchased from Patrick Ta and this formula is GREAT!
Results.Title: BROWN GIRL FRIENDLY!

Results.OriginalProductName: Major Headlines Double-Take Crème & Powder Blush Duo She's That Girl
Results.ReviewText: This review is for people as dumb as me, it opens this way

Results.OriginalProductName: Major Headlines Double-Take Crème & Powder Blush Duo
Results.ReviewText: I love this color!! I am usually a bright pink blush girl but this is a bit of a deeper pink and I absolutely love it. If you’re looking for a deeper blush but still pink this is a good choice!
Results.Title: Love it!

IncentivizedReview.DimensionLabel: I received this product as a free sample

Results.OriginalProductName: Major Headlines Double-Take Crème & Powder Blush Duo She's Giving
Results.ReviewText: This shade is so pretty and pigmented!!! Last alll day !!! I want to get more shades I’m in love 🥰🥰🥰
Results.Title: JUST BUY!!!

IncentivizedReview.DimensionLabel: I received this product as a free sample

Results.OriginalProductName: Major Headlines Double-Take Crème & Powder Blush Duo
Results.ReviewText: Great natural looking blush for brown girls! Im 390 in fenty and when I want to overblush, I use both the cream and powder but for a quick beat, the powder side shows up nicely! I really enjoy this product and honestly I don’t have anything in my collection that is this shade and shows up! Perfect for every day!
Results.Title: Brown Girl Friendly!

2363844.Description: What it is: A viral duo compact of powder and cream blush formulas to achieve long-wearing bold color that melts into skin for a beautiful, radiant glow.   Finish: Radiant Formulation: Cream, Pressed PowderHighlighted Ingredients: - Patented Biomimetic Pigments: Mirror the skin's ceramide structure, ensuring adhesion, true color, and the most natural finish.- Micronized Pigments: Provide even, flawless payoff, a luminous finish, and extended wear.- Creamy Emollient Base: Flawlessly blends into skin, provides a dewy finish, and locks in color for extended wear.Ingredient Callouts: Free of sulfates SLS and SLES, parabens, formaldehydes, formaldehyde-releasing agents, phthalates, mineral oil, retinyl palmitate, oxybenzone, coal tar, hydroquinone, triclosan, and triclocarban, and contains less than one percent of synthetic fragrances. This product is cruelty-free and gluten-free.What Else You Need to Know: This bestselling blush duo is inspired by Patrick’s viral cream-over-powder blush technique. The rich pigments blend together for a long-wearing skin-like finish to create a lit-from-within glow.
2363844.Name: Major Headlines Double-Take Crème & Powder Blush Duo She's That Girl

IncentivizedReview.Label: I received this product as a free sample
